videos.headline: Minnesota stuns No. 11 USC after game-sealing INT
videos.description: Minnesota pulls off the upset win after a clutch interception by Koi Perich to spoil USC's late comeback attempt.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Minnesota stuns No. 11 USC after game-sealing INT) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: USC's Duce Robinson reels in TD to break deadlock
videos.description: USC gets on the board first against Minnesota with a quick three-yard touchdown pass to Duce Robinson.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (USC's Duce Robinson reels in TD to break deadlock) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Max Brosmer powers into end zone to put Minnesota ahead
videos.description: Minnesota's Max Brosmer sneaks into the end zone on a one-yard rush to take a 10-7 lead against USC.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Max Brosmer powers into end zone to put Minnesota ahead) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Woody Marks gets shifty at the goal line for USC TD
videos.description: Woody Marks takes the direct snap and finds the open hole near the goal line to put USC ahead of Minnesota 17-10.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Woody Marks gets shifty at the goal line for USC TD) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Minnesota's Max Brosmer hyped after late rushing score
videos.description: Minnesota's Max Brosmer fakes the hand-off near the goal line and rushes in for a five-yard score to tie the game at 17-17 against USC.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Minnesota's Max Brosmer hyped after late rushing score) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Max Brosmer's 3rd rushing TD puts Minnesota ahead late
videos.description: Max Brosmer's squeaks the ball over the goal line and propels Minnesota ahead of USC late in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Max Brosmer's 3rd rushing TD puts Minnesota ahead late) 2024/10/05 ESHEET
